analysis.reasoning: Core message: Zakharova accuses Poland/Warsaw of selfishly undermining fair competition and harming European energy and environmental security regarding Nord Stream 2. Evaluation per narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): Yes—Poland (a Western ally/EU member) is portrayed as acting selfishly, ignoring fair principles and consumers’ interests, thereby hostile to European security; this frames a Western actor as immoral and harmful. RU2 (Russia leads alternative system): Not present—no promotion of a Russia-led multilateral alternative. RU3 (Russia benevolent partner): Implicitly contrasts Poland’s behavior with energy security, but the tweet does not explicitly present Russia as benevolent or a partner. RU4 (Russian history admirable): Not present. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront): Not present. RU6 (Russia interesting culturally): Not present. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1.
